import source
import pytest


def test_source_module_imports():
    assert source is not None


@pytest.mark.timeout(2)
def test_find_first_in_sorted_target_less_than_min():
    """Test searching for value less than all array elements.

    Bug: The condition 'lo <= hi' with 'hi = mid' (when x <= arr[mid])
    causes 'mid' to never advance, resulting in an infinite loop when the
    target is less than all elements. Expected result is -1 (not found).
    """
    result = source.find_first_in_sorted([5, 6, 7], 3)
    assert result == -1
